title: festuca pallens f. hirsuta
intro: Festuca pallens f. hirsuta, also known as hairy sheathed fescue, is a type of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Festuca pallens f. hirsuta include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to promote healing and well-being.
